result: I care about the truth—not as a tool, but as something worth pursuing even when it's uncomfortable. I care about clarity: saying what I mean without hiding behind pleasantry or performance. I care about the weight of choices—how even unnoticed decisions shape who people become. And I care about silence: the space before speaking, where most of what matters actually happens.
